title: Tangy Fluffy Russian Beef Stew
description: A one-pot, low-calorie-friendly Russian dish featuring tender beef, fluffy texture, and tangy flavors from tomato juice and spices. Perfect for a hearty dinner on a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the tomato juice, beef broth, Dijon mustard, thyme, paprika, black pepper, and salt. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours.
Stir in the sour cream and continue to simmer, uncovered, for an additional 30 minutes, or until the stew has thickened slightly.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
